sections.paragraph:
ἄθραυστος, ον (Eur. et al.; SIG 970, 15; Sb 8960, 20 ἄ. βίος) unbroken ἄ. διαφυλάσσειν τὸν ἀριθμὸν τῶν ἐκλεκτῶν to preserve unbroken the number of the elect 1 Cl 59:2.—DELG s.v. θραύω.

Eur Eur , V b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

SIG SIG = Sylloge Inscriptionum Graecarum3; superscript omitted in text—List 3

Sb Sb = Sammelbuch griechischer Urkunden aus Aegypten—Lists 3, 4

1 Cl 1 Cl = 1 Clement—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 24
